query: Sono un consulente sicurezza sul lavoro: trovami PMI italiane con cantieri, produzione, appalti o crescita del personale operativo
root_causes: required signals were taken only from partial compiler output instead of every explicit query term
catalog patterns missed plural appalti, operai in assunzione and nuovi stabilimenti
preferred source projection stopped after the first compatible signal instead of covering every manifest-required signal
municipal_register supported plant permits in ontology but not in source registry signals_supported
expected_fix: every manifest-required signal has a compatible executable source lane with non-empty query templates and per-signal evidence projection
